# DPS & Co, Chartered Accountants

> A Chartered Accountancy firm in Mumbai, India, established 2016, offering tax, audit, assurance, and advisory services to businesses and individuals across Mumbai, Thane, and Navi Mumbai.

## Practice areas
- [Advisory](https://dpsca.in/practices/advisory/)
- [Tax & Regulatory](https://dpsca.in/practices/tax-regulatory/)
- [Litigation Support](https://dpsca.in/practices/litigation/)
- [Audit & Assurance](https://dpsca.in/practices/audit-assurance/)

## Key services
- [GST Registration](https://dpsca.in/services/gst-registration/)
- [GST Return Filing](https://dpsca.in/services/gst-return-filing/)
- [Income Tax Filing](https://dpsca.in/services/income-tax-filing/)
- [TDS Return Filing](https://dpsca.in/services/tds-return-filing/)
- [Company Incorporation](https://dpsca.in/services/company-incorporation/)
- [Audit & Assurance](https://dpsca.in/services/audit-assurance/)
- [Business Advisory](https://dpsca.in/services/business-advisory/)
- [Accounting & Outsourcing](https://dpsca.in/services/accounting-outsourcing/)
- [Tax Litigation Support](https://dpsca.in/services/tax-litigation/)
